programme.title: Broad Daylight
programme.desc: During a home invasion, Andy is left alone and confronted with a hiding thief who is armed and very volatile.

programme.title: Bullet Proof
programme.desc: A fatal traffic collision reveals a shocking truth, and Andy’s romance with Det. Callaghan gets complicated.

programme.desc: A heat wave has wreaked havoc on the city, multiplied by growing fears of a serial rapist on the loose.

programme.desc: A botched prisoner transport has Andy and Swarek in a cat-and-mouse game to catch the fugitive.

programme.desc: Andy’s ex-cop father has confessed that he may have committed a crime during an alcohol-induced blackout.

programme.desc: Using a car dealership, 15 Division runs a sting operation to crack down on suspects with outstanding warrants

programme.desc: Do you enjoy watching performers pushed into their discomfort zone? Thank God You're Here thrusts well known guest performers into a scenario they know nothing about, working with a cast who do know what's going on. Hosted by Shane Bourne.

programme.title: Thank God You're Here S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Each week four special guests step through a door into a scene where everyone has a script - except them! Comic chaos featuring some of the funniest performers from Australia and overseas. Hosted by Shane Bourne and Judged by Tom Gleisner.

programme.title: Thank God You're Here S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In this celebrated comedy, guest stars Adam Hills, Anh Do, Colin Lane and Julia Zemiro must hilariously navigate an unknown situation greeted only by the line 'Thank God You're Here!'

programme.title: Thank God You're Here S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Kitty Flanagan, Guy Montgomery, Marty Sheargold & Emma Holland take up the challenge when they walk through the blue door on 'Thank God You're Here.'

programme.title: Thank God You're Here S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Do you enjoy watching performers pushed into their discomfort zone? Thank God You're Here thrusts well known guest performers into a scenario they know nothing about, working with a cast who do know what's going on. Hosted by Shane Bourne.

programme.title: Thank God You're Here S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In this celebrated comedy, guest stars Hamish Blake, Josie Long, Peter Rowsthorne and Rob Carlton must hilariously navigate an unknown situation greeted only by the line 'Thank God You're Here!'

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Jimmy and Timmy pull together a group of people like themselves and call their new club the "Crips."

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 703
programme.desc: Toilet Paper: Mrs. Dreibel gives the boys detention for making a phallus out of clay in art class. Angry, they take revenge by toilet papering her house. Officer Barbrady is on their trail. (S7, E03)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: Cancelled: The boys get a sense of deja vu as Cartman again has an anal probe, but they soon realise they're actually stuck in some kind of re-run - Earth is just a reality show for aliens! (S7, E01)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 705
programme.desc: Fat Butt and Pancake Head: When Cartman wins a diversity event with his offensive hand puppet impersonation of Jennifer Lopez, Kyle is enraged. Soon the real J-Lo turns up, mightily peeved! (S7, E05)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 706
programme.desc: Lil' Crime Stoppers: Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny decide to play detective; they go around the town solving minor "crimes" for a dollar. It's not long before they're busting meth labs! (S7, E06)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 707
programme.desc: Red Man's Greed: When the entire town is bought out by a Native American casino, the boys come up with a plan to get their homes back - but is more gambling really the solution? (S7, E07)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 708
programme.desc: South Park is Gay! The TV show Queer Eye For The Straight Guy is sweeping the nation and the men of South Park are embracing metrosexuality, but what evil plan are the hosts plotting? (S7, E08)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 709
programme.desc: Christian Hard Rock: The boys form a band called Moop, but disagree on what direction they should take. Cartman leaves the band and bets them he will have a platinum record first! (S7, E09)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 711
programme.desc: Casa Bonita: Cartman is overjoyed at going to a Mexican restaurant for Kyle's birthday but is crushed when he finds out Butters is invited instead. He'll have to make Butters "disappear". (S7, E11)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 712
programme.desc: All About The Mormons: A new family moves to South Park and their son Gary is an unusually perfect Mormon - this angers the boys no end! Will Stan beat him up or go for a family dinner?! (S7, E12)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 713
programme.desc: Butt Out: When the boys' smoking leads to a nasty incident, it's the cigarettes that are blamed rather than them. Cue the glutinous Rob Reiner to arrive in town with his anti-smoking lobby! (S7, E13)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 714
programme.desc: Raisins: When Wendy breaks up with Stan he takes it hard. The boys decide to take him to the restaurant Raisins, where all of the employees are preteen girls who enjoy wearing heavy make-up. (S7, E14)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The children of South Park are attracted to "Mr. Jefferson," the new neighbor in town, and Cartman goes out of his way to get "Mr. Jefferson" to love him best.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A PETA protest against the use of a cow as South Park Elementary's mascot forces the student body to choose a new one.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: In order to save South Park, Stan and Kyle have to find a way to destroy the ever-expanding Wall-Mart superstore while keeping Cartman from stabbing them in the back.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: Good Times With Weapons: After buying martial arts weapons at a local flea market, the boys are transformed into anime Japanese Warriors, with dire consequences for poor Professor Chaos. (S8, E01)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: Up The Down Steroid: Jimmy is due to take part in the Special Olympics but what dodgy substance is he talked into taking? Cartman fakes being disabled so he can enter and win a $1,000. (S8, E02)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: The Passion of the Jew: After seeing 'The Passion of the Christ' a zealous Cartman taunts Kyle. When Stan and Kenny see it, they hate it and harass a crazed Mel Gibson for their money back! (S8, E03)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: You Got F'd in the A: The boys get 'served' by some kids from the O.C. so now 'it's on!'. Stan puts together a dance troupe who must compete in the dance-off. Will Randy's moves save them? (S8, E04)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: Goobacks: South Park is swamped by workers from the future, who take all the jobs for less pay. The men of South Park go to unusual lengths to stop them. "Dey turk err jurbs!" (S8, E07)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 810
programme.desc: Pre-School: The boys are pooping their pants after hearing that Trent, a notorious bully from their pre-school years, is being released from juvenile hall - guess who put him there? (S8, E10)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 811
programme.desc: Quest For Ratings: When the gang's school news programme trails far behind Craig's show, "Animals Close-Up With a Wide-Angle Lens", they pledge to boost their ratings - how far will they go? (S8, E11)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 812
programme.desc: Stupid Spoiled ***** Video Playset: Paris Hilton opens a store in South Park, corrupting the town's girls in the process. It's up to Mr Slave to put things right - time for a "***** off!" (S8, E12)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 813
programme.desc: Cartman's Incredible Gift: Cartman jumps off his roof while wearing cardboard wings and ends up in a coma. When he awakens he believes he has psychic powers - and the police believe it too! (S8, E13)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: Woodland Critter Christmas: Stan finds talking animals building a Christmas tree in the woods. They enlist him to protect them from an evil mountain lion but things aren't what they seem. (S8, E14)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When hippie drum circles start popping up in people's attics and backyards the citizens of South Park have no choice but to turn to Eric Cartman for help.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The boys set up a talent agency and pool all their resources and impress their first client only to have another agency steal him away.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After the sudden on-set of the disease Gingervitis, Cartman rallies all other ginger kids to rise up and assume their role as the master race.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The boys try to rescue their new friend Willzyx, a talking space whale, from the Denver Sea Park, and with the help of MASA (Mexican Aeronautica y Spacia Administracion) get him home to the moon for $200.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Stan is embarrassed when his dad gets pulled over for drunk driving. Randy believes that only one thing can save him from his 'disease,' a bleeding statue of the Virgin Mary in the next town.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 901
programme.desc: Mr Garrison's Fancy New Vagina: Mr Garrison has a sex change, Kyle has an unusual operation to make him tall and athletic enough to play basketball and Kyle's dad has "dolphinoplasty"!?! (S9, E01)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 904
programme.desc: Best Friends Forever: Kenny is in a coma. Cartman wants life-support turned off so he can get his PSP. But Kenny's spirit is leading the armies of heaven against the demons of hell! (S9, E04)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 905
programme.desc: The Losing Edge: The boys are bored of playing baseball, and concoct a plan to lose the big play-off game. Randy trains hard to become the biggest drunken jackass at each match. (S9, E05)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 906
programme.desc: The Death of Eric Cartman: Everyone decides to ignore Cartman! He is convinced he is dead and must find peace by making amends for his past sins. Will Butters' 'psychic ability' help him? (S9, E06)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 907
programme.desc: Erection Day: Jimmy's noticed that one of his body parts has a mind of his own, so he tries to control his raging hormones in time to perform his comedy routine at the School Talent Show. (S9, E07)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 908
programme.desc: Two Days Before The Day After Tomorrow: Stan and Cartman crash a speed boat into the world's largest beaver dam, flooding the town of Beaverton. Everyone's response is that of mass hysteria! (S9, E08)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 909
programme.desc: Marjorine: Cartman is convinced that the girls have a device which can see into the future. The boys come up with a plan to take it. Unfortunately for Butters he's a major part of the plan. (S9, E09)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 910
programme.desc: Follow That Egg: In a bid to prevent Mr. Slave from marrying Big Gay Al, Mrs. Garrison forces the children to help him in an experiment to prove that gay marriages are unstable. (S9. E10)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 913
programme.desc: Free Willzyx: The boys are tricked into believing the killer whale at Sea Park is from the moon. How will Timmy's wheelchair, the Russian government and their skateboards help to free him? (S9, E13)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 914
programme.desc: Bloody Mary: Randy is arrested for drunk driving and must attend AA, where he is told he is powerless to control himself. Maybe the bleeding Virgin Mary statue can perform a miracle or two? (S9, E14)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Towelie gets over his drug addiction and writes his memoirs. With Oprah's support, his book becomes a best seller and his story inspires millions to turn their lives around.

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1001
programme.desc: The Return of Chef: The boys notice that Chef is acting weird after returning from the 'The Super Adventure Club'. Why is he trying to seduce them? Can a trip to a strip joint help? (S10, E01)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1006
programme.desc: ManBearPig: Ex U.S. Vice President Al Gore visits South Park Elementary and warns the pupils about ManBearPig, a monster which is "half man, half bear and half pig" - you can't be "cereal"! (S10, E06)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1007
programme.desc: Tsst: Cartman's mum realizes she can no longer control him, so attempts to get help from various reality TV experts. Only when she recruits the "Dog Whisperer" do results start to happen. (S10, E07)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1008
programme.desc: Make Love, Not Warcraft: The boys are all shades of mad when a 'griefer' repeatedly kills them in an online game. Some serious training is in order so they can defeat him and play the game! (S10, E08)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1010
programme.desc: Miss Teacher Bangs A Boy: Power goes to Cartman's head when he becomes "Dawg the Hallway Monitor". Meanwhile, Kyle is shocked to discover his little brother Ike and his teacher are at "it"! (S10, E10)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1011
programme.desc: Hell On Earth 2006: Satan has a Sweet 16 style party in L.A. on Halloween! The gang perform a ritual and manage to summon Biggie Smalls - who demands Butters helps him get to the party! (S10, E11)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1013
programme.desc: Go God Go XII: Cartman is stuck in the future, caught up in a battle between atheists and sea otters! And what will become of Richard Dawkins and Mrs. Garrison's love affair? (S10, E13)

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Reggie makes John a test subject in her psychology experiment and Jake gets his driver's license renewed. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Linda and Reggie date the same man and Becker unwillingly gets involved. Bob finds out he has a tenant whos a prostitute. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Becker gets an unexpected visit from his godson who is reluctant to tell his father he's gay. Reggie gets into a caddy argument with her friend, Sara. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 20
programme.desc: John Becker has insomnia and the gang tries to help him get through it. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 21
programme.desc: John runs into an old college mentor/professor who doesn't remember him. This torments John who tries to get the professor to remember him. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 22
programme.desc: John thinks the new water deliveryman is bad luck. A string of mishaps occur and everyone blames it on the deliveryman. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 23
programme.desc: John is being sued for malpractice by a patient. Louis knits Margaret a swest (sweater/vest) and Reggie, Bob and Jake discuss the worst ways to die. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Beckers patient sues him for malpractice and Bob sleeps with his Johns lawyer, Ruth. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Becker sees a psychologist and Linda looks for a new job.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: During an attempt to quit smoking, John attends a for-kids only pancake breakfast.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Jake gets married to a girl he just met. John buys a faux designer clock as a gift, which gets broken.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: John helps a homeless man he discovered is a con artist when he learns the man is ill.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: John takes Reggies advice to be more sensitive with women. It helps at the office with Margaret, but backfires with a woman he is dating.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: John panics when he has to get an MRI, finally resorting to Valium to get through the claustrophobic test.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Reggie goes out to dinner with her abusive friend Sara and Sara's husband, Richard. She finds that she and Richard are attracted to each other.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: John tries to keep a casual love affair alive, while Bob tries to turn a found Super Bowl ring into his ticket to fame and fortune.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- John believes that Christmas is a phony time of the year. Instead of embracing the Christmas spirit, he uses getting robbed as vindication for his position.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: John is surprised when a patient is disappointed at the news that he's not terminally ill. Jake scams Bob in a Scrabble game.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Reggie meets Johns's friend Dan, who is recently divorced from an extraordinary, accomplished woman.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Becker and the crew decide to barter services office visits for food and services.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker bores a bartender with a story about his ex-wife's wedding.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Becker obsesses over whether or not younger women still find him attractive. Linda takes advantage of a hard-working temp.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Becker gets in hot water with parents when his nutrition lecture at an elementary school turns into a sex talk.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: An unflattering picture of someone other than John is placed in an article about him, causing him distress.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: John gets a portable talking computer for his speech-impaired patient, with unintended consequences.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Reggie decides to help Jake fulfill some of the dreams he had as a child, with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Bob uses a questionable friend to get Reggie a great deal on a new freezer. John acts as a sex therapist for the Bennetts, an 80-year-old couple having difficulties because of Mr. Bennett's newly revived libido.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker's laundry, apartment, and mail have all been tampered with and he is sure the culprit is one of his pesky neighbors.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 22
programme.desc: When John receives some expensive steaks from a patient, his new neighbor Chris cajoles him into throwing a party.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 23
programme.desc: John is surprisingly concerned when he learns that his new neighbor Chris has left town without saying goodbye.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Reggie and Chris compete for John's affection. Linda takes Margaret out for a night on the town.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: John enters the diner from Reggie's apartment, trying to sneak out.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Now that Reggie is gone, John tells Chris he has feelings for her (Chris).

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: John sits on his fire escape, smoking a cigar, the smoke from which is wafting into Chris's open window directly above.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: As John and Jake chat about Chris at the diner, Bob rushes in and announces that he just saw Chris naked when he went to fix her faucet.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Becker has a videotape of a French film that he plans to use to lure Chris into coming over to his place.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Becker tries to discourage a friend from expressing interest in Chris by telling him that she is gay.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris is in the kitchen when a robber enters.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- At the diner, John expresses his repulsion for all the Christmas decorations.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: At the office, Margaret reveals to Linda that it's her ten-year anniversary of working for Dr. Becker.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 12
programme.desc: One of John's patients, a high school student named Brad, comes in for a physical and John learns that the guy's being sexually active, but isn't practicing safe sex. John performs an HIV test on Brad and tries to convince him to begin practicing safe sex.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Bob is distraught because a thirty-something guy at his gym died while on the treadmill, and he's certain that he's headed for the same fate.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker is upset when a patient substitutes his Christian Science faith for medical treatment.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 15
programme.desc: John helps his elderly neighbor, Mrs. Firth, get into her apartment and she repays him by making homemade chicken noodle soup.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 16
programme.desc: John's at the end of his rope with his hectic practice and makes a call, which Linda overhears, telling the person on the other end that he can't take another day.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 17
programme.desc: When a customer leaves the diner because of John's cigarette smoke, Chris puts her foot down and tells him that it is now a "smoke-free" restaurant.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 18
programme.desc: John arrives at the diner and announces that he has quit smoking.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 19
programme.desc: John walks into the diner and sees Chris, Bob, and Jake standing around a booth.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 20
programme.desc: The fire marshal threatens to fine Chris for a faulty sprinkler system at the diner, but Chris flirts her way out of it.

programme.title: Risk and Reward
programme.desc: Amy and Ty take Lyndy on her first camping trip, but things go awry when they find an injured animal.

programme.title: Change of Heart
programme.desc: Georgie enlists Wyatt’s help in reuniting a famous trick rider with her long-lost horse.

programme.title: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: The new manager at Fairfield comes to Amy and Ty with an unusual concern.

programme.title: Running Scared
programme.desc: Amy and Tim organize a team penning event for the family, but Tim manages to turn it into a town spectacle.

programme.title: Stress Fractures
programme.desc: Lou returns to Heartland with an unconventional idea to attract guests to the Dude Ranch.

programme.title: Long Road Back
programme.desc: Amy and Ty work together to treat a doped racehorse.

programme.title: All Hearts Lead Home
programme.desc: After receiving tragic news, the family finds ways to cope with their grief.

programme.title: Room to Grow
programme.desc: When Jack finds out Will Vernon’s wild horses are in danger, the family rallies behind him to bring them home.

programme.title: Snakes and Ladders
programme.desc: A disgruntled horse owner causes problems for Ty and Amy’s business.

programme.title: Wild One
programme.desc: Amy is hired to gentle one of the wild horses, but his temperament may prove impossible to work with.

programme.title: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: Jack is faced with painful memories from his past, and the family is at a loss for how to help him.

programme.title: The Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: A dangerous windstorm wreaks havoc on Hudson.

programme.title: Fairytale
programme.desc: Amy and Ty worry about the impact a surprise visitor will have on Luke.

programme.title: A Time to Remember
programme.desc: Georgie’s graduation has finally arrived, but so has a mysterious figure from her past.

programme.title: The Art of Trust
programme.desc: Amy is asked to spend time at an art retreat to work with an artist’s allegedly traumatized horse.

programme.title: Legacy
programme.desc: Tim is roped into organizing an important rodeo when an old flame blows back into Hudson asking for his help.

programme.title: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Amy and Ty get some unexpected news about Luke just as Amy has to face an upsetting truth about Spartan.

programme.title: The Passing of the Torch
programme.desc: When fears of holding on or letting go grip the family, they look to each other for support.

programme.title: Keep Me in Your Heart
programme.desc: While Amy deals with a major upheaval in her life, Lou copes with the reality of being the mayor of Hudson.

programme.title: The Last Goodbye
programme.desc: Amy's efforts to help a young girl form a connection with her new horse takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Making Amends
programme.desc: Lou gets into even more hot water when she tries to sell Hudson as a “must see” tourist destination.

programme.title: Through the Smoke
programme.desc: Disaster strikes Hudson when a train derails and causes an explosion that threatens the surrounding area.

programme.title: Outsiders
programme.desc: The black stallion that Amy rehomed from Will’s ranch is brutally forced out of the herd by the new leader.

programme.title: The New Normal
programme.desc: When a group of wild horses need new homes, Amy must host her first horse clinic in over a year.

programme.title: Courage
programme.desc: Tim seeks out help from an unlikely person when he finds himself competing in a polo match.

programme.title: Changing Gears
programme.desc: Caleb finds a memento from the past that he thinks will have special meaning for Amy.

programme.title: Find Me in the Dark
programme.desc: Quinn's wealthy father arrives at Heartland with a life-changing proposition for both Amy and his son.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Rosie gives birth to a boy, and Eddie tells Marilyn he saw who stabbed Bill.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Frankie and Bea fight during a dance class, and Yates is caught smuggling for Marilyn.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lynn reveals she was raped by Mr Bentley, and Vera has trouble with her ailing mother.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lizzie finds a stray cat in the garden and brings it into the prison.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 8

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Marilyn's boyfriend Eddie is suspicious of where she got the money for his birthday gift.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Vera's drinking gets her in trouble, and Helen Masters cons everyone to win her acquittal.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The Governor introduces a volleyball program to let the inmates work off their tension.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: As news of an escape spreads, Vera attempts to tighten security.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The payroll robbery goes disastrously wrong. Lynn goes into labour.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Doreen and Franky masquerade as nuns to con people into giving them money.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Meg and Karen find Lynn on the floor of her cell, bleeding.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Lynn is rushed to hospital after her suicide attempt.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Barbara has drugs smuggled into the prison.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Bea is furious to learn from Vera that Barbara is inside for smuggling drugs.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Franky talks Doreen into robbing a hardware store but the hold-up goes wrong.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Doreen starts behaving like a Franky clone, and Lizzie hears from her brother.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Barbara's hearing manages to cast doubt on her aunt's impartiality, thanks to Vera.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 23
programme.desc: Doreen bullies Barbara, who barricades herself in her cell.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Doreen tries to apologise to Barbara, and Karen's retrial drags up painful memories.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Karen's appeal seems to be going badly, and Lynn gets into trouble at work.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 26
programme.desc: The shoplifter's identity is revealed, and her story immediately makes an impression.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 27
programme.desc: Susan's husband sues for custody of their children, and Vera learns about George.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 28
programme.desc: Lizzie and Doreen hatch a plan that involves breaking into the governor's office.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 29
programme.desc: A shocking incident on a daytime TV show leads to a return to prison for one woman.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 30
programme.desc: Lizzie makes a grim discovery in the laundry. Monica makes a bid to take over as Top Dog.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 31
programme.desc: When Bea learns she will be going back to Wentworth soon, she escapes from the hospital.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: When three dum-dum crooks get ahold of a camera that takes pictures of the future, they set out to make a quick fortune with their new toy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After a derelict Santa Claus is fired on Christmas Eve, he finds a mysterious bag that gives out presents. With this bag, he sets out to fulfill his one wish - to see the less fortunate inherit the bounties of Christmas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In a tragic, western town, a desperate father begs for clemency as his son is slated to die for an accident he could not have prevented.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: At a prominent club in Washington, D.C., a socialite argues about whether it would be possible to change history by traveling back in time. When he leaves the club he finds himself in 1865, on the night that President Lincoln will be shot.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: A used car salesman buys a car that dooms him to tell only the truth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: When a woman investigates a clamor on the roof of her rural house, she discovers a small UFO and little aliens emerging from it. Or so it seems.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Gaining telepathic abilities when his coin lands on its edge bank clerk Hector B. Poole learns about the difference between other people's plans and fantasies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: While in the hospital recovering from overwork, Liz Powell keeps dreaming about going down to the hospital morgue.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Passing through the sound barrier a commercial airliner inadvertently travels back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: A timid vacuum-cleaner salesman is given the strength of 300 men by some experimenting aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 20
programme.desc: An old radio is taking bitter bachelor Ed Lindsay back to a happier time before what he considers worthless tripe on television when he starts picking up radio programs from the 1930's and 1940's.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 21
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler cajoles his friend to use his telekinesis to affect the results of the gambling tables in Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 22
programme.desc: A toy telephone becomes the link between a young boy and his dead grandmother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 23
programme.desc: A pioneer from a wagon train in 1847 sets off to find something for his ill son and stumbles into present-day New Mexico.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 24
programme.desc: After successfully stealing a gold shipment, a group of criminals and their scientist accomplice put themselves in suspended animation in a remote desert cave. When they awaken decades later, complications ensue when their truck is destroyed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Annoyed by a club member's constant chatter, a man bets him he cannot remain silent for a year, living in a glass enclosure in the club basement.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Adam Grant is trapped in a recurring nightmare, in which he is sentenced to death and executed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 27
programme.desc: Using the power of mind over matter, Archibald Beechcroft remakes the world to his own specifications.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 28
programme.desc: Following a frantic phone call about a crashed spaceship, two policemen try and determine who among the passengers of a bus at a snowed-in roadside diner is from another world.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 29
programme.desc: In a future totalitarian society, a librarian is declared obsolete and sentenced to death.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A man and a woman, on opposite sides of a future war, encounter each other in a deserted town.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A plane lands safely, but the pilot, crew and all of its passengers are missing!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: On the road home from the Civil War, a Confederate soldier stops at a burned-out house and gets to know the owner, a recent widow.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Championship pool player Fats Brown returns from the grave for one last game.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: After a poor but ambitious Central American farm worker overthrows his country's tyrannical leader, he believes he sees assassins everywhere. A look in the mirror reveals his most dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Before he died, notorious gunslinger Pinto Sykes put a curse on hired-gun Conny Miller. Miller returns to town and is challenged to visit the grave of Sykes, despite the curse.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Little Anthony Fremont controls an entire town with his ability to read minds and make people do as he wishes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: A former Nazi SS Captain returns to the ruins of a concentration camp to reminisce and is met by one of his victims.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Confederacy scout Sgt. Joseph Paradine finds a town full of Union soldiers, and an old man who claims he used witchcraft to paralyze them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Alan Richards plans to build a dam in Africa on a tribe's ancestral land. The tribe's witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Woodrow, a janitor living in the year 1890, accidentally activates a time traveling helmet which transports him to 1962 - then promptly breaks down.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: A hobo, clown, bagpipe player, ballerina and military officer are trapped in a huge cylinder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: A gung-ho young soldier gets a new viewpoint on war when he inexplicably changes places with a Japanese officer trying to stop his superior from leading a charge against American forces.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: A lonely old woman refuses to leave her apartment for fear of meeting "Mr. Death."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Paul Radin has invited three people to join him in his bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 18
programme.desc: A vagrant steps into a murdered gangster's expensive shoes and is taken over by the dead man's ghost, who vows to remain on Earth to seek revenge against his killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 19
programme.desc: On a hunting trip, Hyder Simpson and his dog Rip dive into a lake after a raccoon. When he gets home he finds that no one can see or hear him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Actor Rance McGrew makes TV Westerns for a living, but he's a lousy actor and a worse cowboy. Despite that, each week he "wins" against the bad guys. Finally, the bad guys have had enough and decide to teach McGrew a lesson.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 21
programme.desc: The senior residents of Sunnyvale decide that the secret to youth is acting young, and in particular playing a childhood game called "kick-the-can."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Fortune discovers that a piano he bought his wife for her birthday has magical properties - the music that it plays makes people reveal their true essence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 23
programme.desc: Jeff Myrtlebank comes back to life at his own funeral and soon begins to act very strangely...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 24
programme.desc: The Kanamits, 9-foot tall aliens, arrive on Earth with one lofty goal: To Serve Man.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Old Ben, who is able to transform himself into anything, tries to help a crippled little girl.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Old Ben, who is able to transform himself into anything, tries to help a crippled little girl.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 27
programme.desc: David Gurney wakes up to find that no one - his wife, his co-workers, his best friend, not even his own mother knows him.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's a case of mistaken identity when Greg, a mobster who looks just like Mark, is released from prison and moves into Mark's neighborhood.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Jesse operates and removed the bullet from Greg, thinking he is Mark. But everything starts to unfold when mark show up for his shift at the hospital.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Mark's patient and shock-jock radio talk show host Denise announces her nation-wide search for her birth mother and jokes that she'll kill her if she doesn't want anything to do with her.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 10
programme.desc: A woman is murdered during the burglary of her opulent Malibu home, a burglary in which a rare diamond, part of a set of famous Russian jewels known as The Seven Deadly Sins, is stolen.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 11
programme.desc: As preparations for the hospital's Christamas party swing into high gear, Claude, a popular hospital maintenance man, who each year portrays Santa Claus at the big bash, collapses.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan finds himself needing a vacation from his vacation when his plans for a relaxing trip abroad a cruise liner as a doctor is turned upside down as a family finds their father has been murdered.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Mark and Amanda have brough their kids to the set of Frontier Dad, a popular western TV series, to watch the filming of an action sequence.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan must solve the murder of renowned chef Rene Fontenot, however, with Rene being a ladies man and a successful chef with many competitors, the list of suspects keeps growing and Amanda finds herself among the accused.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan finds himself in the middle of another murder investigation that hits too close to home.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan finds himself in unfamiliar territory when a string of murders seem to be connected to a state of the art computer system and its not so stable inventor and owner Bruce Locatelli.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Mark and Steve return home from a fishing trip to a shocking discovery - the bloody and beaten body of Mickey, the young medical student who, along with his wife Jill, also a medical student, had been house-sitting for them.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Steve reluctantly goes on a dating game show and wins. Much to his pleasnat surprise, his date appears to be everything he's looking for and more.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Steve gets an unexpected phone call from Hawk, an old friend from the police force who has recently retired and moved into the Sunny Meadows rest home.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Marine Lt. Hank Thomas enters BBQ Bob's, the favorite lunchtime hangout of the doctors, wielding a gun in his left hand and threatening three other Marines who are already there.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Paraplegic, asthmatic game show contestant Sol Singer climbs into his specially-modified van and sets out to a TV studio where he is bout to compete on the live quiz show "Through the Roof."

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Dear friend and famous pop singer Danielle Marsh comes from new York to stay with Mark and Steve while she prepares for a big comeback conecrt.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 23
programme.desc: The murder of a young woman brings Alex into contact with her roommate Amy Saroyan, Alex's former girlfriend whom he has not seen in many years.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 24
programme.desc: While a deliriously happy Madison helps new love Brett Hayward move in with her, Steve investigates the brutal slaying of palastic surgeon Dr. Yordsberg.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Roger and Lana's marriage is rocky at best. Lana plots for her lover to kill Roger while he is away for the night on business so that she can have all of his money.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: While driving, David tells his wife Laura that he wants a divorce. Laura becomes hysterical and begins to cry and hit him. Trying to fight off his wife's attacks, David loses control of the car and flies into an intersection.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Jim, the hospital janitor, teaches Dr. Sloan some magic tricks. Jim is a whiz at magic and can nimbly manipulate a medallion between his fingers.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: George, a schizophrenic homeless man, shows up on a beach prophesizing about death. The couple in the nearby beach apartment, Cynthia and Ethan, threaten to call the police.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When Steve Sloan is hospitalized for injuries sustained in a high-speed car chase, he wakes in a haze and watches with a blurred vision what looks like another patient being stabbed by one of the medical staff in his room.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Nurse Stacy Bradshaw tells Dr. Sloan about her skydiving escapades, and he politely turns down her extreme thrill-seeking invitation to come along.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Dr. Travis catches Dr. Sloan in his office, settling in with a bowl of popcorn to watch a reality television show, "Hot House," a "Big Brother" and "Real World" type series.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Mark's friends Stanley and Tammy have decided to preview Tammy's new fashion line at their wedding.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Designers are taken to a movie theatre where they work in teams… with unconventional materials!

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers make a look that could be worn twenty years in the future in Marie Claire magazine.

programme.title: Project Runway

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Heidi asks the designers to create a red carpet look that she could wear to the Creative Arts Emmys.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Designers work in pairs to create looks that could be worn for a “nontraditional wedding.”

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: With the help of Chopard, the designers create an extravagant eveningwear piece inspired by jewelry.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Inspired by Samsung's Curved TV, designers create avant-garde pieces that look good at every angle.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers create a modern look for a girl, inspired by the “Beforever” American Doll collection.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are asked to find a stranger on the street to act as their muse/model for a makeover.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are taken to a warehouse and bid on storage units in order to obtain their materials.

programme.title: Project Runway

programme.title: Project Runway

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: For the designers, the opportunity to show at New York Fashion Week has finally arrived.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: All of the designers reunite one last time to discuss their experiences on Project Runway together.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: Designers create collections inspired by NYC's uptown or downtown scene. Ivanka Trump guests.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: A construction site forces designers to create feminine fashion from masculine materials.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: With the Broadway musical Wicked, the All Stars face off to design couture inspired fashion.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: Nina Garcia returns to judge colorful party dresses inspired by designers' personal relationships.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: The designers meet British royalty in London, England as inspiration for winter wear.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: The stakes are high as the All Stars designers roll dice on the runway for a fashion gamble.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: Love is in the air as the All Stars design looks for Match.com singles on first dates.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: Designers must collect their fabric from under the wate to make Elegant resort wear swimsuits.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: Underwater marine life provides inspiration for avant-garde fashion.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: Alyssa and the judges take over Times Square to school the designers in the business of fashion.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: Marchesa's showroom inspires bridesmaid dresses for a real wedding ceremony.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: Marilyn Monroe's timeless beauty inspires dazzling red carpet gowns.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: The All Stars finalists design collections representing all 4 seasons of the year. Season finale.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Some of the models resist getting make-overs and a few of them are unhappy with their new looks.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The women must create an ad campaign, which includes casting, wardrobe, providing props and hair and make-up.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The American women start to break down while the British rally together. Kelly Cutrone and Nigel Barker join J. Alexander and Tyra Banks on the judges' panel for elimination.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The women head to Toronto for fashion week where they must go on castings to book modelling jobs.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 6

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 7

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 11

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 12

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Rewind and review the challenges, photo shoots and dramatic personalities that make up the British Invasion cycle of Top Model.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Guest chef Curtis Stone returns as contestants cook a tasty dish worthy of immunity. But in this classic MasterChef challenge, as their pantry of ingredients increases, their cooking time decreases.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Who will crack tonight in an eggscellent elimination challenge that sees contestants given just one egg to create the tastiest dish? Fail, and they must scramble to cook for their lives in Round 2.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 16
programme.desc: 26 alphabetical mystery boxes contain single ingredients that correspond with the letter on the box. Chefs must cook using their designated ingredient, with the bottom four headed for a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Fat Duck pastry chef Gareth Whitton sets today's pressure test with his smoked pecan and butterscotch tart. The dish that least resembles Gareth's creation will send its maker home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 18
programme.desc: London's celebrated chef Clare Smyth has selected cherries and honey as two core ingredients that teams will need to cook with in today's service challenge, as they duke it out for a shot at immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 19
programme.desc: The winners from yesterday's service challenge compete in a 2-round dual duel immunity challenge. Tthe contestant who creates the two most impressive dishes will dodge Sunday's elimination bullet.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 20
programme.desc: It's elimination day and the creator of the best Round 1 fare will keep their team safe. Those fighting to avoid the drop must then prepare a tasty dish to be left overnight and cooked the next day.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 21
programme.desc: In a grungy Fitzroy warehouse, contestants lift the lids on their mystery boxes, leading to coffee beans spilling out across their bench as judges reveal they must create a dish that features coffee.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Arriving at Alla Wolf- Tasker's Lake House restaurant, contestants must recreate his summer cucumbers with Murray cod dish. The contestant whose dish least resembles Alla's will be going home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 23
programme.desc: Teams need to create the prefect date night meal including an entrÃ©e, main and dessert for 25 couples plus the judges. The two teams with the least impressive menu will head to a shock elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 24
programme.desc: The bottom two teams from yesterday's challenge face elimination and must split their 90 minute cooking time over two rounds, with the creator of the least impressive second round dish going home. Plus, Masterclass #2

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 25
programme.desc: It's time to switch things up, and everyone is now cooking for themselves to stay in the competition. The maker of today's best dish will win a cash prize of $10,000 and a game-changing immunity pin.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Today's mystery box has been set by the Queen of the kitchen, the legendary Maggie Beer. The four least impressive dishes created from the mystery box will send their makers into a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 27
programme.desc: Fish butcher extraordinaire Josh Niland reveals his first pressure test dish, tuna wellington with mashed potato and tuna gravy. Whoever cooks the dish that is least like Josh's will be sent home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 28
programme.desc: Teams face a service challenge for 60 hungry diners at the stately Werribee Mansion. To win a shot at immunity, contestants must turn humble ingredients into a fine dining entrÃ©e and posh main course.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 29
programme.desc: Contestants vie for immunity from Sunday's elimination over a 2-round fry up, and must create the best dishes using an everyday air fryer, before cooking a sweet or savoury dish using a deep fryer.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 30
programme.desc: Competitors must identify a selection of leafy greens and herbs. The first six contestants to incorrectly name the produce must create their tastiest dish that celebrates greens to avoid elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 31
programme.desc: Andy opens today's mystery box to reveal a mini stormcloud as lightning flashes around the kitchen. Contestants must create a dish for a rainy day, with a fast track to the immunity challenge at stake

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 32
programme.desc: Gelato master Donny Toce presents his intricate dessert, Honey, comprising a honey tuille, gelato honeycomb, and blown sugar beehive for tonight's Pressure Test, and failure will send someone home!

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 33
programme.desc: Contestants become artists today for a creative service challenge, and the judges expect three-course masterpieces as they take inspiration from a virtual forest at digital art gallery, The LUME.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 34
programme.desc: An imposing figure appears in the kitchen - it's iconic chef Marco Pierre White, and contestants face a pressure test to win immunity by recreating his panache of sea scallops, calamari and ink sauce. Plus, Masterclass #3

programme.title: Survivor US S26 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Two immunities and two tribal councils raise the stakes forcing castaways to consider big moves on their biggest threats.

programme.title: Survivor US S26 Ep. 13
programme.desc: For the first time in Survivor history, not one, but two loved ones venture to an exotic locale to visit their favorite castaways.

programme.title: Survivor US S26 Ep. 14
programme.desc: With the title of sole survivor within arm’s reach, one tough castaway falls victim to a heartbreaking medical emergency.

programme.title: Survivor US S26 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Castaways are reunited for the first time since the Caramoan Islands.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Season Premiere of Australian Survivor: Blood V Water, located in Far North Queensland where 24 castaways will face off with their loved ones to see who has what it takes to be crowned Sole Survivor.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Battle lines are drawn with one castaway on the outs with the Blue Tribe. Then, When an idol is found, someone at Tribal Council tries to flush it. Will they succeed?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A new day, a new Reward Challenge, with a trip to the coveted Survivor Shop. With one person from the winning Tribe able to take someone from the other Tribe along with them.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When one member from the losing Tribe is invited to the winning Tribe's Reward Challenge treat of croissants and sweet things, it's a long overdue reunion for one cute pair.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The grueling barrel Immunity Challenge is back! Castaways must withstand the heat while holding their weight. In an epic battle, one person dials up hero mode and wins the challenge for their Tribe.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 6
programme.desc: In another epic Immunity Challenge, two Castaways push themselves to their limits, leading to potentially dire consequences for their Tribes. Then, One Castaway breaks ranks and warns a friend.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's Tribe Swap time! As the game heats up, the time has come for the Castaways to truly play their own game, even if it means turning on a loved one.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Last night's Tribal Council plays on the minds of quite a few Castaways. In true Tribe Swap fashion, not everything is rosy as strong personalities struggle to navigate a new environment.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The game is well and truly underway with one Castaway deciding the time is right to start playing alliances off one another.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 10
programme.desc: It's another epic reward challenge, this time for a picnic with all the trimmings, and while the winning Tribe is ecstatic, one Castaway is nursing an injury.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 11
programme.desc: One Castaway moves heaven and earth to try to get their Tribe to love them once more. At Tribal Council, an epic playbook blindside is executed to the letter.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It's no surprise that it's always the quiet ones you need to watch for and tonight, someone's game really begins to heat up.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Another testing Immunity Challenge, with the last two standing being the most unexpected. With secrets exposed and alliances rocked, the vote at Tribal Council is a total surprise for one Castaway.
