programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Arg prepares for his performance at the 1960’s themed party but is thrown to hear that Lydia will be making an appearance

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Essex Fashion Week arrives, but who will win the prize for being the most glamorous Essex girl. Sam? Amy? Jessica?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: On this episode of The Only Way Is Essex it’s VIP night at the opening of Mark’s new club

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In this episode of the Only Way Is Essex, follow the tears, the tantrums and the triumphs of Amy, Mark, Sam, Kirk and Jessica.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: What will happen to the resdients of Essex in this episode?? Suffice to say there is drama and excitement on the cards for everyone…

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Tonight on The Only Way Is Essex it’s firework night. But who’ll be causing them? Will it be Mark and Lauren? Or Amy and Kirk?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: In this episode, will Nanny Pat like her makeover? Can Lauren accept her boss’s offer? Will sparks fly on Amy’s date? And can LOLA give the performance to make their dreams come true?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In this last episode of the Only Way Is Essex, all roads lead to Romford for the big showdown. Yes it’s Mark’s boxing event and he’s thrown down the gauntlet to Kirk.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Amy introduces her new client Chloe to the group where Mark encourages her little cousin Joey to make a move with Lucy.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Will Arg and Lydia ever move in together? Or will it be Lydia’s mum Debbie or Arg himself who puts the breaks on it? We see just how painful a break up can be for Lauren.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Amy is on the lookout for a new assistant, but will see find anyone suitably glamorous enough? Kirk’s in a dilemma, but which way will he go? And Arg is on a mission, but is it a road to nowhere?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Will Amy’s new assistant Paloma make the right impression at the salon? Newly single Kirk throws a party, but who will take centre stage? And will Lauren’s culinary skills hit the mark when the Wrights descend for dinner?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Just as Joey is about to bite the bullet and ask out Lucy, he sees her flirting with Kirk instead leaving both him and Chloe confused.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Joey is still torn between Lucy and Sam and is determined to ask one of them out at Harry’s 17th birthday party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lauren G is raging when Mark suggests to her he starts a modelling agency and tries anything to mark her stamp on him.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Mark and Lauren G attend a wedding fair where it’s clear they both have very different ideas of the type of wedding they want.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The day of Mark and Lauren G’s big engagement party arrives and the guests are shocked at the scale of it comparing it to an actual wedding.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Joey has a proposition for Mick as he plans to be the face of one of the nights at Sugarhut

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Mark thinks of a way of taking Arg’s mind off of Lydia so plans a game of tennis doubles with him.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lydia starts to wonder if Amy is the girl in the rumor who slept with Arg but Debbie assures her otherwise

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: With Joey now taking over Essex with his club nights, Mark is determined to get back on the scene and reclaim his title.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Lauren G is infuriated to discover she isn’t invited to Mark’s pool party in case she makes the female guests feel uncomfortable.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It is Jess’ 26th birthday party, which bring together new faces and old flames under the same roof

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey, Lydia and Debbie head to the local car boot sale to see if they can get any items for Lydia's new shop.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Lauren P, Lauren G and Maria meet for a birthday breakfast. Mark and Mario cross paths at the gym. Mick and Kirk talk women post singles’ night…. Mick reveals he likes Maria.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Maria and Mick finally get friendly over a romantic dinner date. The twins model for Jess and show off their assets. Lucy shows off her curves. And Mario and Mark lock horns.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tension rises with Maria and Gemma over Mick. Mario turns up the heat on Lucy with a proposition but will it all go horribly wrong. Mark and Mario face up once again with Mark having a killer ace up his sleeve.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Gemma and Frankie reveal their body concerns in a moving heart to heart. Joey gives Kirk some interesting fashion tips. And a smashing time is had by all when the twins hold “Greek Night”

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Gemma takes Harry under her wing-mirror as she teaches Harry to drive. No bum notes for Chloe with her first consultation for her bottom implants. And Kirk hosts Karaoke night at the Sugar Hut ……with screaming success!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Joey hosts an unusual cockney/ animal themed party. Mario and Lucy cozy up and there's fun on the slopes!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Cara and Billi get ready for a night out on the town….Kirk and Joey style! Mark woos Sam and Mario show Lucy his Italian side.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Sam gets her feet under the Wright's family table during a cosy Sunday lunch and Arg tackles his body issues full on starting with his gnashers!|Mick and Kirk spend some quality father/son time bonding during a fishing trip.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Lucy wonders whether she’s made a big mistake by giving Mario a free pass. Sam gets a surprise visitor and Mark, Jess, Gemma and Arg head to Boot Camp for fat-busting workouts and some intimate revelations!!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lydia finds out what happens at Bootcamp doesn’t necessarily stay at Bootcamp. Everyone gets in the ghoulish spirit for Halloween. Nanny Pat goes trick or treating and Sam and Billie host an action packed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: It's the morning after the night before and Lauren G and Sam are both reacting to "that kiss"

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In the season finale: Arg continues his quest for physical perfection and seeks fashion advice from none other than Mr Essex himself, Joey, with "interesting" results!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1308
programme.desc: It's Holly's birthday and she gets a massive surprise when Kyle shows up. Marty goes in on Chloe but takes it too far. Meanwhile, Aaron and Marnie's relationship reaches breaking point. (S13, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1309
programme.desc: The Geordies reach boiling point... Marty tries to make it up to Chloe, but will she forgive him? And is there any way back for Aaron and Marnie after the previous night's break up? (S13, ep9)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S13 Ep. 1310
programme.desc: In the series finale Chloe and Marty get flirty again, but can they really stay just good friends? Kyle gets some big news from Boss Anna, but the fallout will change the family forever. (S13, ep10)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: It all kicks off when eight Geordies become housemates. Vicky can't decide if she prefers Jay or Greg, Greg wants to leave, and Holly, the only housemate in a relationship, is unfaithful.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Jay's aware that he's bitten off more than he can chew with Vicky, Charlotte fights off advances from Gaz, whilst Sophie gets the shock of her life when her parents turn up unannounced.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: It's Jay's birthday and Vicky's playing the dutiful 'girlfriend', Holly's boyfriend visits, Charlotte loses the battle to fight off Gaz and the house is rocked by a shock departure!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: With Holly gone, the atmosphere in the house takes a turn for the worse. Vicky and Jay fall out, Gaz plays away from home, and someone else tries to leave.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Holly makes a surprise return to the Geordie Shore house, but not before Jay and Gaz face their toughest work assignment at a working man's club. Anna pushes Vicky too far.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 106
programme.desc: There's no fairytale ending in the Geordie Shore finale. Gaz gives Charlotte some serious news, Jay and Vicky's relationship erupts in a shocking way, and Holly faces a car park altercation.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 150
programme.desc: The cast reunites along with their friends, family to unravel the truths of those involved and to talk about socks, chlamydia and the never ending parsnip.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 151
programme.desc: The Geordie Shore cast head to Magaluf for the summer hols. The lads quickly make up for lost time with the ladies, and tensions explode with Char and Gaz, resulting in the biggest Geordie bust-up yet!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S1 Ep. 152
programme.desc: There's more Magaluf madness as the gang struggle to get along. Under the watchful eye of Charlotte and Vicky, Gary continues to charm the ladies, and Holly rocks another wet t-shirt contest!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: Yes, it's time to 'get on it like a car bonnet'! Series 2 kicks off with two feisty new housemates joining the house... but will it be a warm welcome or a frosty reception? (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Charlotte is pushed to breaking point as lothario Gaz continues to pull anything in a skirt. Rebecca's feistiness intensifies as she faces competition to win one of the boy's affections... (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: There's no time to mourn Charlotte's departure as Vicky and Ricci's nocturnal spooning is interrupted by an unexpected visitor. Meanwhile, Gary and James are quick to get their kit off! (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: James continues his lucky streak with the ladies. Unlucky in love Sophie is played for a mug. Gary persuades Charlotte to return... but has she managed to get over him as she had hoped? (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: The 'cheer us all up' party ends in carnage as Charlotte tries to move on and the boys exchange blows. Vicky and Ricci make their relationship official with jaw dropping consequences... (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: Ricci and Gary rock the house, leaving Vicky and Charlotte stunned. Meanwhile, the girls set off on a road trip tackling a colonic, Geordie Style, and it all ends in tears before bedtime! (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: The honeymoon period is over as Vicky and Ricci split. Rebecca reveals her secret party trick, much to Jay's delight, whilst Gary comes clean with Charlotte. It's pure mental like! (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: It's almost the end of the gang's time in the house, and hardly any relationships are left intact. Vicky and Ricci move on, Sophie gets dumped and Jay leaves a bad taste in Rebecca's mouth. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 250
programme.desc: The Reunion brings the cast and their friends & families together to find out what really went down during series 2. Host Russell Kane will rummage through the tensions, passions, laughter and tears.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: It's time to swap the grey river Tyne for the crystal blue waters of Cancun, Mexico for the carnage of Spring break! Vicky and Ricci are loved up, whilst Jay is missing the love of his life. (S3, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: With the house reduced to carnage and Sophie losing even more faith in boyfriend Joel, there are still plenty of beaches to party on. Meanwhile Holly ups her game in the pursuit of James. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Sophie is elated as Joel surprises her with a visit. But will he be able to behave himself? And with everyone fearing that his worldie mission may now be over, Holly moves in on her prey. (S3, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: The chaos in Cancun continues as Gaz celebrates his birthday in true Geordie style. Charlotte takes her holiday romance to the next level. Vicky erupts as Cancun Chris gets sweet revenge. (S3, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Vicky and Ricci return to the house in time for Becca's birthday which goes off in usual Geordie style. Sophie sends Joel back to England, but it's not long before she regrets the decision. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: An unexpected call means James has to choose between his best mates and Holly. Gary has another threesome and a night out trying to forget about Gary ends in disaster for Charlotte. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: The boy-girl divide returns! Charlotte and Gaz aren't speaking, Becca and Jay are continually arguing, while Holly and James' nurse-patient relationship is back to strictly professional. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: After a night at the clubs, Pauly and Mike have to juggle multiple groups of girls. And mayhem breaks out when a fight erupts at a bar, and one of the housemates goes down. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Snooki's violent encounter at the bar brings the housemates closer together, and she finally feels like she's a part of the family. Ronnie and Sammy's relationship reaches new heights. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 106
programme.desc: The situation gets out of control when Mike has girls back to the house. Snooki fights again, and Ronnie gets into a brawl of his own, leaving Sammi questioning their relationship. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 107
programme.desc: The roommates head to Atlantic City where fun turns to fury when Mike manages to antagonise both Snooki and JWOWW. And one roommate reveals that she used to have an eating disorder. (S1, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: The summer's winding down, but the drama doesn't stop. Pauly's got a stalker and a fight lands another roommate in jail. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 109
programme.desc: Ronnie's released from his night in jail. Snooki's upset after a run in with an ex. The housemates wrap things up at the Shore, but not before one final hot tub hook up. (S1, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 111
programme.desc: Questions are answered when Snooki, The Situation, JWOWW, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi and Vinny return for more fights and insights into what happened down at the Jersey Shore. (S1, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 112
programme.desc: Every summer, thousands of kids head to the Jersey Shore to take part in that East Coast rite of passage: The Share House. Jersey Shore captures that phenomenon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 113
programme.desc: Every summer, thousands of kids head to the Jersey Shore to take part in that East Coast rite of passage: The Share House. Jersey Shore captures that phenomenon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: The Jersey Shore crew is headed to Miami! They are shocked by the surprise arrival of former housemate, Angelina, and the drama picks up right where it left off at the seaside. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Sammi tries to figure out what Ronnie really did at the club the night before. When Angelina interrupts Pauly's game, we see a whole new side of the usually calm Pauly D. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: Angelina apologises to the girls. But back at the house, Mike, Vinny and Pauly have a close encounter with grenades in the hot tub, while Ron continues to creep behind Sammi's back. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: Ron's bad behaviour puts Snooki, Angelina and JWOWW in a tough spot. Together the girls decide to write an 'anonymous' letter to Sammi and finally reveal the entire truth. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: Sammi finds Snooki and Jenni's 'anonymous' letter, and this time it's really over with Ronnie. Mike, Vinny and Pauly ('MVP') have their hands full, juggling four girls in one night! (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: The anonymous note causes tension between the girls, culminating in a full-blown cat-fight. And after sharing a night in bed with Vinny, Snooki reveals a not-so-little known fact. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: The roommates deal with the aftermath of the fight. Angelina starts dating Jose, a guy from the club; Jenni and Snooki clean up the smush room in preparation for Snooki's hook-up. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: When news gets out that Angelina and Vinny hooked up, Mike threatens to spill the beans to Jose. Vinny and Pauly find the girls of their dreams, but one of them will be heartbroken. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 209
programme.desc: Things go south for Angelina when the house learns that she slept with Jose after smushing Vinnie, but trouble really ensues when she gets too close to a guy Snooki hooked up with. (S2, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 210
programme.desc: Mike reunites with his Canadian hottie, providing entertainment for the whole house. But when Angelina tells her roommates how she really feels, she pushes Snooki into a frenzy. (S2, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 211
programme.desc: With Angelina gone, Snooki thinks it's time that she and Jenni bury the hatchet with Sam but Snooki's happiness is short-lived as Mark becomes increasingly belligerent with her. (S2, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 212
programme.desc: Everyone is frustrated with Mike's poor game after he gets them kicked out of a club, gets the car towed, nearly burns down the house and fails as a wingman for Pauly D - twice! (S2, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 213
programme.desc: Pauly D and Vinnie have final dates with their Miami girls, and Sam and Ronnie can't stop fighting. Meanwhile, Jenni stirs things up between the boys, leading to a dramatic final night. (S2, ep13)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 214
programme.desc: The cast is back together to dish the dirt on Miami - from bromances and romances, to the infamous note and the fights that followed! (S2, ep14)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: Leftover tension from Miami spills over to Seaside when unresolved issues among the girls explode on the first night. And new roommate Deena gets naked in front of The Situation! Series 3, Episode 1.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: The first night's fight causes tension in the house. Ronnie & Sammi keep isolating themselves, but things really explode when Ronnie decides to chill with the other housemates. Series 3, Episode 2.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Sammi decides to make peace with Snooki and Deena. JWOWW runs into her old flame Roger and sparks fly. Meanwhile, Snooki gets arrested for public intoxication. Series 3, Episode 3.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: After Snooki is arrested, she becomes depressed... until she meets a new guy. Denna meets Ronnie's stunt double. Meanwhile, JWOWW's relationship with Tom comes to a dramatic end. Series 3, Episode 4.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Ronnie and JWOWW make up, leading to Sammi punching Ronnie in the face. Vinny picks up a girl with an overbearing family, and The Situation learns Deena's dirty little secret. Series 3, Episode 5.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Ronnie's over-drinking causes some painful side effects, Snooki meets a guy who may or may not be engaged, and Pauly D makes peace with an old nemesis. Series 3, Episode 6.

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: Josh's parents are staying over but will The Crosbys and The Ritchies get on? Charlotte suspects paranormal activity and turns to a medium and his dog. Mel's birthday ends in disaster. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: Will Charlotte and Mel resolve things in time for their trip to South Africa? Josh proves himself to be the ultimate hero when he rushes to Charlotte's aid after a terrifying accident. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: Charlotte plans a surprise to take her and Josh to a whole new level of love, but how will Josh react? Josh attempts to overcome his biggest fear to prove his love to Charlotte. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: Charlotte Crosby's real-life reality show is back! Charlotte tries to put a plan in place for having babies with Josh, but Josh thinks she's moving too fast and things go downhill. (S3, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: After a huge fallout about when to have a baby, can Charlotte and Josh save their relationship? Banana goes to the vets, and Lauren has an emotional surprise for Charlotte. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Charlotte has an embarrassing accident which results in a trip to the mattress shop. Charlotte must tell her mam and Lauren some big news about her and Josh, but how will they react? (S3, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh invite their parents for a weekend away, but will their families still get on after a weekend together in the Lake District? (S3, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh discover they will be travelling abroad for work, but an argument over a smoothie threatens to ruin the trip. Charlotte sees a consultant about her breast pain. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh head off to Brazil. But their romantic getaway turns sour after a series of arguments leaves Charlotte questioning the future of their relationship. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh's trip to Brazil ends in style with a helicopter date. When back in the UK, Charlotte heads straight into surgery for an operation to remove her breast implants. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: Charlotte comes out of surgery after having her breast implants removed, but it looks like recovery will be slow and painful. It's Charlotte's birthday and she and Josh have a joint party. (S3, ep8)

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: As Lauren Conrad juggles fashion school, a demanding internship and an unpredictable roommate who sabotages her work event, she learns quickly that everything is bigger in Los Angeles, including her problems.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren deals with the fallout of Heidi crashing the Teen Vogue party. When Heidi lands an interview for a 'dream job' that leads her to consider ditching school, permanently, Lauren realizes that she and Heidi may be on different paths.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sends Lauren on an overnight errand that lands her in New York City and returns to LA only to find a major surprise from her past waiting for her.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When an ex-boyfriend reappears in Lauren's life, she is surprised to see she might not be as over him as she thought. Meanwhile at her new job, Heidi asks if the price of paying her dues is worth the cost.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Lauren races home from an all-day Teen Vogue event to be with Jason on his birthday, but the night doesn't turn out as she expected. Audrina seeks Heidi's advice for her latest date with model/actor, Danny.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Jason becomes a mounting distraction in Lauren's professional and academic life. Heidi finally gets her big chance to work in the nightclubs, but it couldn't have come at a worse time.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's the gang's first Holiday in LA and not everyone gets what they wish for. A New Year's kiss proves hard to come by for Lauren when Jason finds out she got an unexpected call from an old flame.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Jason wants to make Lauren's 20th birthday special but when she lies to him about working with male models for a Teen Vogue assignment their relationship is put to the test.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Heidi finally decides she's had enough drama with Jordan. When she turns to the girls for advice, she realizes what she has to do to. With their fighting days behind them, Lauren and Jason think about taking things to the next level.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: When Lauren's hard work at LA Fashion Week leads to a career opportunity of a lifetime, she is torn between her job and her boyfriend. Whitney says goodbye to LA for the summer, and Heidi and Audrina look forward to being single in the city.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After a rocky summer with her boyfriend Jason, Lauren decides to break it off and returns to Teen Vogue to face her unhappy boss. Heidi finds herself in trouble with a guy both she and Audrina are dating.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren goes on her first date since Jason and is tested at work when she's asked to work a fashion show. Heidi has a life changing secret she must tell her boyfriend.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When an uninvited Audrina shows up at Heidi's birthday, she learns Heidi's not ready to forgive and forget. Lauren, determined to focus on work, falls for the charms of the new guy in her life, Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Audrina tells Heidi about Spencer's cheating ways, but Heidi is doubtful - until she sees it for herself. Lauren continues to wonder whether she is ready for a relationship.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Heidi takes a break Spencer but finds herself missing him more than she'd like. Lauren has to plan a Teen Vogue dinner but takes a backseat to super-intern Emily from New York.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When Lauren tells Heidi what she really thinks about Spencer, Heidi must choose between her best friend and her boyfriend.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lauren realizes she can't trust her best friends after Heidi hooks Jen up with Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Audrina takes Lauren out on blind double date, while Lauren and Heidi grow farther apart.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Spencer asks Heidi to move in with him but Heidi doesn't know what to do or how to tell her roommate, Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Lauren's 21st birthday is full of surprises when Heidi and Audrina throw her a party.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: With a new job on the line, Whitney stumbles in her biggest opportunity with Teen Vogue.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In this season finale, tension comes to a head as Heidi makes her final decision about moving in with Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Lauren doesn't go to Heidi and Spencer's housewarming party.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren and Heidi grow even farther apart when Spencer asks Heidi to marry him.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Lauren tries to help Audrina decide if Justin is boyfriend material.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Heidi takes her fiancé Spencer to meet her family in Colorado.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Heidi's social circle shrinks as Spencer breaks up with Brody for hanging out with Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lauren gets a blast from the past when her ex-boyfriend Jason calls.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lauren's feelings for Jason are rekindled, but when they run into Heidi and Spencer, tempers flare.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Lauren is shocked to learn that Jason has a girlfriend, but Jason has a bigger surprise for her.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The gang celebrates Brody's birthday in Vegas and Audrina's boyfriend causes a rift in her friendship with Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Jen Bunney tells Lauren that Brody started the rumors about her, but Brody blames on Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Lauren starts a new romance with a male model, but realizes she still has feelings for Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lauren and Whitney are sent to New York City to present for Teen Vogue's top editors.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Lauren and Whitney struggle to put on a fashion show at Teen Vogue's Young Hollywood Party.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Former Army man, Joe DePinto, now President and CEO of 7Eleven, goes undercover to work on his company's front lines.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Dave Rife, White Castle owner and grandson of the founder, goes undercover in the family business.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: COO of Churchill Downs, Bill Carstanjan, faces his fear of horses head-on to go undercover in his own company.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Michael Rubin, one of America's youngest CEOs, goes undercover in the billion-dollar e-commerce company that he founded.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Joel Manby, a boss who recently turned his life around, goes undercover in his nationwide theme park and amusement company.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: President and COO Rick Arquilla goes undercover in the largest plumbing and drain cleaning company in North America.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chris McCann, President and COO of America's largest florist and online gift shops, goes undercover.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Steve Joyce hits the frontlines of his own company, which includes such popular hotel franchises as Comfort Inn, Econo Lodge, Quality and Cambria Suites, and receives an exhausting, up-close look at the industry.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Kim Schaefer, CEO of Great Wolf Resorts, North America's largest family of indoor waterpark resorts, struggles to keep pace working in an aquatic center and gets her hands dirty when she responds to a call no waterpark employee wants to receive.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Mike White, Chairman, President and CEO of DIRECTV, the world's most popular video service goes undercover in his own company where he discovers that employees are spending their own money for a specific piece of equipment.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Bryan Bedford, Chairman of the Board, President and CEO of Frontier Airlines, goes undercover in his own company, where he "gets christened" while emptying a plane's lavatory and discovers how company-wide pay cuts are impacting his employees.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Steve Phelps, SVP and Chief Marketing Officer for NASCAR, the #1 spectator sport in the U.S., goes undercover with one of the sport's pit crews and also struggles to keep pace working alongside a grounds crew preparing for the "Daytona 500."

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Fernando Aguirre, Chairman and CEO of Chiquita, one of the largest producers of fruits and vegetables in the world, is unable to perform a physically demanding job at their flagship factory and has to be removed from the line.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Todd Ricketts, one of the owners of the Chicago Cubs, goes undercover within one of baseball's most famous franchises and fights for the chance to redeem himself after being let go on the second day.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Steven Foster, Co-Founder and CEO of Lucky Strike Lanes, one of the nation's largest chains of upscale bowling alleys, takes an emotional trip inside his own company where among other things, he hits the streets as a walking bowling pin.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Don Fertman, the Chief Development Officer for SUBWAY restaurants, one of the world's largest food franchises, goes undercover where he learns endless sandwich combinations while being trained by one of the toughest, no-nonsense employees ever.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Henrik Slipsager, President and CEO of ABM Industries, one of the nation's largest facilities services contractors, offering janitorial, engineering, parking and security services for thousands of clients, takes a journey within his own corporation.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: John Fuller, President and CEO of Johnny Rockets, one of the nation's largest chains of retro-themed restaurants, goes undercover to work in a restaurant for the first time in his career.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Kevin Sheehan, President and CEO of Norwegian Cruise Line, finds himself in uncharted territory when he's asked to lead nearly 1,000 party-goers in a line dance, and is later forced to reveal his true identity after being recognized by an employee.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Ronald Croatti, President and CEO of UniFirst, one of the nation's largest producers of workwear and uniforms, dons a "hippie" look during his undercover mission, where he finds himself struggling to keep pace with the fast-moving assembly line.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Sheldon Yellen, the CEO of BELFOR, the world's largest disaster restoration company, goes undercover and becomes frustrated while struggling to hang drywall. Also, the boss unexpectedly reveals himself while working alongside an employee.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Denny Slagle, President and CEO of Mack Trucks, the second largest manufacturer of heavy-duty trucks in the world, goes undercover and brings the plant's assembly line to a halt, and hears rumors that Mack is moving its operations to Mexico.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The mayor of Cincinnati, Mark Mallory, becomes the first elected official to go undercover as a municipal employee, working as a mechanic repairing public transportation vehicles and a sanitation worker.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Rich McClure, CEO of United Van Lines, the nation's largest moving company, asks his wife to assist him during one of his undercover jobs. And the boss' moving team fears he won't make it through the physically demanding process of an entire move.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Scott Sibella, President and COO of the MGM Grand in Las Vegas, goes undercover within the walls of the second-largest hotel in the world and faces a group of rowdy gamblers who are quick to point out his shortcomings as a dealer.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Bill Massa, President and CEO of Synagro, the nation's largest waste water treatment corporation, goes undercover in the series' dirtiest mission to date and finds himself cleaning a tank of 27-year-old sludge.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tthe portable pod lands at Love Luton Festival where some mysterious cases pop up. A young women arrives with monster bruises and a lady with unexplained skin patches all over her body.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In tonight's show, Dr Christian sees a man with a fishy smell coming from his penis while Dr Pixie helps a woman whose nipples stick out above her bra after botched breast surgery abroad.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Tonight, on Embarrassing Bodies, we are looking back at the 'best of the breasts' revisiting our most memorable cases, to see how they've been getting on.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The doctors catch up with a woman who had excessive facial hair, and another with an inverted nipple. And Dr Christian gives an update on how young men should check for testicular cancer.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tonight the Embarrassing Bodies doctors take to the seaside town of Brighton where they get to the bottom of a bleeding anus and pus filled tonsils.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: In tonight's show our doctors look back at our lumpiest cases. Whether it's lumps on your balls or boils on your bottom, over the years Embarrassing Bodies has seen the lot.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S4 Ep. 20
programme.desc: In the clinic tonight, Dr Christian looks after a man who can't get an erection, while Dr Pixie helps a teenager embark on astonishing facial surgery to finish correcting her cleft lip and palate.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: In tonight show we revisit past patients including Maria, who first visited the clinic in 2009, she was very embarrassed about the excess hair she had developed on her face and back.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: In the autumn of 2008, eight year-old girl Charlotte Wilson visited the clinic, desperately seeking help for an extreme condition. Her feet were covered with veruccas; a common viral infection.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S5 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Tonight on Embarrassing bodies, we're catching up with the memorable cases that came to clinic looking for post-op help and finding out how they've been getting on..

programme.desc: In the UK John McVicar gets away with one of the most brazen escapes in British history, in New York State a small-time criminal on the run turns into a cop killer.

programme.title: Declassified S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: During the early years of the internet, the United States Secret Service conducts a groundbreaking mission to take down a hacker group called Shadowcrew.

programme.title: Murdertown S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: In Bristol, we hear from the parents of Louise Smith, who woke on Christmas morning 1995 to find their daughter had not returned from a night out the previous evening.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The Craigslist Killer also known as Philip Markoff, was 23 when he was preparing for a promising future as a doctor and a life of happiness with his fiance, Megan McAllister.

programme.title: Declassified S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The FBI and DIA team up to capture Senior Analyst Ana Montes for allegedly passing sensitive intelligence to Cuba.

programme.title: Declassified S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The FBI and CIA embark on a decade-long effort to catch the highest-ranking CIA officer to ever commit espionage.

programme.title: Real Prison Breaks S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A prison nurse kills a guard to spring her inmate lover from jail plus great train robber Ronnie Bigg's daring escape and 10,000 days on the run.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Queensland Cat Protection Society president Kathleen Marshall is found brutally stabbed to death.

programme.title: Real Prison Breaks S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In the UK, a sociopath bomber uses a hand-made key to open a door to freedom.

programme.title: Declassified S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: During the Cold War, the U.S. military races against time to recover classified footage from a top secret survellience satellite.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S8 Ep. 103
programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: The FBI Files S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: For nearly two decades a mathematical genius with delusions of single-handedly destroying industrial society, planted or mailed powerful bombs to unsuspecting innocent victims.

programme.title: Critical Rescue S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: In 2001, hundreds of people pour into the Lonz Winery on Middle Bass Island in Ohio for a Fourth of July celebration. Leon Wyszynski and his wife Mary Jane dine with friends on the terrace.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S9 Ep. 114
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The FBI Files S6 Ep. 95
programme.desc: In the 1980's the federal penitentiary in Atlanta held some of the country's most notorious prisoners. Castro called them undesirables. The U.S. government called them detainees. In 1987 they staged a bloody revolt.

programme.title: The FBI Files S5 Ep. 72
programme.desc: Too often, convicted felons learn new techniques and find new partners in prison. In 1982, a group of former inmates began a spree of kidnapping and robbery.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S8 Ep. 94
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques to trace a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S5 Ep. 53
programme.desc: When there's a difficult case to crack  whether it involves drugs, arson, or weapons  the investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms have the means to crack it.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S6 Ep. 56
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S9 Ep. 117
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S8 Ep. 97
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: Critical Rescue S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: On October 17, 1989, Sherra Cox leaves work early to unpack in her new apartment. Shortly before 5:00 pm, the building begins to shake. Cox braces against a doorframe as San Francisco is slammed by a 7.1 earthquake.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S3 Ep. 18
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S4 Ep. 34
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder, at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their undoing.

programme.title: Critical Rescue S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: On the afternoon of May 3, 1999, the National Weather Service issues serious tornado warnings for Oklahoma City. Known as “Tornado Alley,” this part of the country receives frequent storm warnings that are often ignored by its many residents.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S8 Ep. 93
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S6 Ep. 60
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The FBI Files S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The day began like any other for Cheryl and Paul Chapman, until the silence of a peaceful Sunday morning was shattered with a phone call.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S4 Ep. 30
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S5 Ep. 54
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The FBI Files S7 Ep. 109
programme.desc: In the 1980s the drug trade ravaged Chicago's inner city neighborhoods. Heroin and cocaine sales soared. Violent crime threatened to destroy the community.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S5 Ep. 43
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The FBI Files S7 Ep. 115
programme.desc: In the United States, identity theft costs citizens billions of dollars. In some cases, it costs the lives of innocent people.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 44
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 62
programme.desc: A report on the 1980 murder of Marilyn McIntyre, who was found dead in her home. Her husband, Lane, had returned home from work that morning and found her body. As police checked into his alibi, he named his friend Curt Forbes as a potential suspect.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 43
programme.desc: An examination of the story of Laura Hall, who was convicted and sent to prison for the crime of dismembering the body of Jennifer Cave in 2005.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 46
programme.desc: In June 2007, Dewayne Barrentine met Tausha Fields and soon after they began living together. Tausha told him some unbelievable stories about herself – leading Barrentine to verify her stories online, which resulted in the uncovering of a homicide.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 51
programme.desc: A report on the 2007 murder of Jennifer Turner, married but separated from Dr. Kirk Turner, due to his infidelities with the family banker, Tondja Colvin. Jennifer had filed for divorce and also brought an alienation of affection suit against Tondja.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 59
programme.desc: In August 1996, Yvette Rodier and Zach Snarr went to the mountains for their date to take photos of the full moon, when a stranger drove up, pulled out a gun and opened fire. Zach was killed. Yvette, shot four times, survived by pretending to be dead.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 60
programme.desc: In August 2009, Sandra Franklin called police to report a confrontation with her husband, Dr. Peter Franklin. Shortly after, authorities received a call from Peter, who had been stabbed. Within hours, Peter was dead and Sandra was charged with murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 15
programme.desc: On December 2, 2000, 30-year-old Eric Miller died in a Raleigh, North Carolina hospital. Blood tests had revealed that he had been poisoned with arsenic.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 27
programme.desc: Susan Wright was a stay-at-home mother from Texas who stabbed her husband Jeff, 193 times. She claimed she was a victim of domestic abuse and that on January 13, 2003, her husband attacked her with a knife and she fought back in self-defense.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 28
programme.desc: On January 8, 2000, college students Danielle Keener and Dan Zapp were on a date, walking along a river’s edge outside York, Pennsylvania, when they were kidnapped at gunpoint by a man in a pick-up truck.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 42
programme.desc: In September 2006, Kathy Wangler, wife of anesthesiologist Dr. Mark Wangler, died from carbon monoxide poisoning in their home. Their 30-year marriage had been falling apart; In 2009, investigators concluded that Dr. Wangler had murdered his wife.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 28
programme.desc: A report on the mysterious 2009 death of world champion boxer Arturo Gatti. When Gatti was found dead in Brazil, police characterized the death as a homicide and arrested his wife.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 46
programme.desc: A report on the November 14, 2006 shooting of Danny Hill, by his wife, Charlene. Charlene claimed that their seemingly happy life together was a facade and that she shot him in self-defense

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 56
programme.desc: A report about Don North, a free spirit who took to the waters of the Caribbean, living among the tight-knit "cruiser community", a group of individuals who choose to live their lives on the water.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 7
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 52
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The story of Amanda Knox, an American exchange student who was convicted, along with her Italian boyfriend, Raffaelle Sollecito, of murdering Amanda’s British roommate, Meredith Kercher in 2007.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 61
programme.desc: An investigation into the 1999 scuba diving death of Shelley Tyre while on vacation on the Caribbean isle of Tortola. Police questioned her husband and dive partner David Swain about every detail of the dive; autopsy results were inconclusive.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 59
programme.desc: In September 2002, two men were found executed in a burning Mercedes in an upscale Hollywood neighborhood. What initially looked like a drug-related murder, turned out to be something entirely different, but the crime scene left little evidence to go on.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 38
programme.desc: A report on questions surrounding the apparent suicide of Jocelyn Earnest, a successful businesswoman who was found dead in her home in December 2007, from a gunshot wound to her head, with a revolver by her side and a suicide note on the floor.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 48
programme.desc: A report about a desolate strip of land between Houston and Galveston where over 30 young women and girls have disappeared or have been murdered.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 39
programme.desc: A report about three Texas housewives, Tammye Markle, Joni Shannon, and Tina Wiley, who call themselves the "Facebook Detectives" and who used the Internet to try to find their friend Lisa Stone, who disappeared from her Dallas home in June 2010.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 60
programme.desc: In October of 2009, 20-year-old Noor Almaleki and Amal Khalaf, the mother of her boyfriend Marwan, walked out of a Peoria, Arizona DES office and were struck by an SUV driven by Noor's father and Iraqi immigrant, Faleh Hassan Almaleki.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 50
programme.desc: A report on the murders of Philip Heidt and his son Carey, the shooting of Philip's wife, Linda, and the secret extra-marital affair of Carey's wife Robin with his brother Craig, who has been convicted of the murders of his father and his brother.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 43
programme.desc: A report about Harold Landry, a self-made millionaire who left behind his life in Louisiana to pursue a romance with a British woman he met online, and how this seemingly perfect relationship ended when Lucy Landry was murdered at their home in 2010.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 58
programme.desc: A report on the hunt for a serial killer suspected of murdering three young women from Los Angeles, California to Chicago, Illinois.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 49
programme.desc: A report on Canadian filmmaker Mark Twitchell, whose obsession with the Showtime television series "Dexter" turned to reality and led to murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 27
programme.desc: A report on the case of Anthony Graves, who spent eighteen years -- twelve of them on death row -- in a Texas prison for murders he did not commit.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 36
programme.desc: A report about how female Los Angeles Police Detective Stephanie Lazarus was charged with the 1986 murder of Sherri Mae Rasmussen. The victim, newly married to Lazarus’ ex-boyfriend, was attacked, beaten and shot to death in her Los Angeles home.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Aspiring actress Vicki Morgan is bludgeoned to death with a baseball bat by her roommate. After he confesses to the cops, it seems like an open and shut case. But things quickly take a turn.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: White rage drives a young man to murder nine black churchgoers in Charleston, SC, in 2015 and fuels a vicious bomb plot to kill Muslim refugees in Kansas. Authorities want to know where it will end.

programme.title: Who The Bleep Did I Marry? S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: At last Ana Margarita Martinez's love has come along. Little does she know that this man and husband of one year has a dark secret.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S2 Ep. 3

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords S1 Ep. 6

programme.title: Who The Bleep Did I Marry? S2 Ep. 10

programme.desc: The Stocking Strangler, a serial killer who brutally rapes and murders his victims, is caught and sentenced to death in Georgia. Vanity Fair writer David Rose uncovers shocking facts about the case.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S2 Ep. 2

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S2 Ep. 12

programme.desc: The Ghost Hunters enlist the help of Bravo's The Real Housewives of Atlanta as they embark on this week's investigation.

programme.desc: The site of the bloodiest battle of the Revolutionary War sets the stage for an unforgettable investigation by TAPS.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S10 Ep. 9
programme.desc: TAPS investigates Houghton Mansionin North Adams, Massachusetts where the repercussions of a deadly car accident could be behind unexplained phenomena on the property.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters S7 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The TAPS team has been called out to investigate Hill View Manor in New Castle, Pennsylvania. Once a nursing facility, this now abandoned building is fraught with paranormal activity that allegedly stems from the violent deaths of former patients.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony travels to Las Vegas Nevada with his food author friend Michael Ruhlman. Whatever your need, whatever bad behaviour you’d like to display Las Vegas is the place that will allow it... for a price.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants, tribal allegiances and post-war uncertainty in Libya. Bourdain looks at the country through personal stories, food, and the music of anti-Qaddafi rapper expats.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Welcome to Putin’s Russia. If you don’t fall into line, you could be the target of a show trial and be thrown into a penal colony. But if you’re hungry you might actually find something worth eating.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Israel, the West Bank and Gaza are three locations Tony has never travelled to before.The intense and fraught relationship between these places is hard to understand but Tony will attempt to delve into the lives of those who live here, through their food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. No better way to see the mash-up of cultures that make up this uniquely American State, than by what the people here are eating

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The first time Tony visited Beirut, it didn't end well. Now Tony is back in Beirut, where all the world’s troubles and all the world's good comes together to form a city like no other.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Once Johannesburg was the most dangerous city in the world, but the end of the apartheid has lead to vast changes in the city. Tony visits the Johannesburg suburb of Hillbrow, and discovers the culture and, of course food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: With the slight relaxation of control by the government of Myanmar, Tony is finally able to explore one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, Tony returns to one of his favourite places on Earth, Vietnam.He journeys to a city he has never been to, Hu?, The City of Ghosts.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Detroit holds a unique place in American history. Few cities have seen such a dramatic rise and fall from economic boom to disparity. Tony explores the past, present and future of the Motor City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Tony dives into the ever-changing state of Punjab, India. Starting off his journey in Amritsar, Tony is immediately struck by the chaos around him.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 6

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: The Fickle River
programme.desc: Trek north with a thirsty elephant herd and see wild dog pups go exploring.

programme.title: Praying For Rain

programme.desc: Journey into the waters of Cocos Island, where marine life flourishes.

programme.title: Weatherproof

programme.title: Agile
programme.desc: Admire the speed and grace of these alphas’ fancy footwork and killer moves.

programme.title: Social
programme.desc: Face down team-playing alphas who get by with a little help from their friends.

programme.title: Scrappy

programme.title: Gothic Fortress: Palais des Papes

programme.title: Gothic Fortress: Palais des Papes
programme.desc: Builders worked day and night for 20 years to erect Avignon's medieval Papal Palace, a symbol of Church power.

programme.desc: Training is in full flow for Bonny the dog on her quest to sniff out snakes, but Julia is called poolside to fish out one cool snake, before facing an extremely close call.

programme.desc: Julia saves a karate school from a highly venomous visitor. Meanwhile, Johnny Bagpipes leaves his lady flying solo as he prepares to fly to Rome.

programme.desc: Hannah, a romance columnist, thinks she's got life and love figured out until her boyfriend unexpectedly breaks up with her. Her editor hires a new writer to collaborate on her column and sparks fly.

programme.title: Cooking with Love

Their rivalry intensifies when the Royal Prince of Samavia rolls into town looking for a royal baker for his brother’s coronation. When Allie and the Royal Prince hit it off, it seems he might be in the market for more than just a terrific cake. But will the sneaky Marilyn let Allie get it all: the gig and the prince? Of course not.

programme.desc: When Blaze smells smoke at Axle City’s garage, he calmly and courageously leads his friends outside to safety. Axle City’s fire chief is impressed with Blaze’s courage and thinks maybe he has what it takes to be a fire fighter, too.

programme.desc: Leah, Shimmer, and Shine attend a party at Samira's palace. Zeta crashes the party pretending to be Samira. Zeta uses a potion to swap Leah's voice with a bird's. Will Shimmer and Shine understand Leah's tweets?

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lost and Found: Dora and Boots find a little baby blue bird who fell out of her nest.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: After searching endlessly for Zac's missing dinosaur toy, Leah asks her genies to wish up a replacement and gets stuck with a real live Apatosaurus! Leah, Shimmer, and Shine have to figure out a way to fix this behemoth mistake.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 114
programme.desc: Geo and his friend Dylan find out that the ice cream truck is missing! Geo meets up with Milli and Bot, and they set out to find the missing truck and solve its problems.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Blaze and Stripes transform into ferociously fast jungle cats to race in the Animal Island Championship! But to win, they’ll have to beat Crusher disguised as a cheating cheetah. Can they claw their way to victory?

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: With her brave dog at her side, Dora races on her scooter to the Big River so they can rescue Boots.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 14

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Crusher and Pickle challenge Blaze and his friends to a sailboat race. But when he tries to cheat, Crusher accidentally crashes both ships onto a tropical island!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Kittens in Mittens: Dora is reading a book of nursery rhymes to Abuela's kitty, Lucky. Lucky loves the one about the three little kittens who ring the bells on their mittens as they dance and sing!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: A cute little Zenguin takes a wishing coin and leads the girls on a chase around their new boat. / The girls visit Imma, the Waterfall Genie, at her home for a pool party, not knowing that Zeta is close behind.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 608
programme.desc: The Big Red Chicken's doing magic tricks for us today! For his first trick, he turns Boots into a chicken! But when he's going to turn him back into a monkey, he lets out a big sneeze that sends the wand flying off into Magic Land where it breaks!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Dora, Emma and Kate help Gus the Bus take all of the instruments to the kids at Music School.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 15

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 17

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 6

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 309
programme.desc: Dub gets tickets to a VIP performance of the hottest musical of all time - Flavor City.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After Drake and Josh accidentally kill Megan's pet hamster, they ready themselves for her revenge that could come anywhere, anytime.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 119
programme.desc: Kenzie invites an uninterested Babe to her coding club, but Babe swoons when she meets coding cutie Scott. An aging app predicts Trip will go bald and Dub helps him avoid his fate.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Gustavo thinks its time to build some hype around Big Time Rush and sets up an important interview with famous blogger, Deke. Deke has been known to make or break a career so the guys must get this right.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: After Mindy tells Josh she loves him, Josh turns to the only logical place for advice: Drake.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 106
programme.desc: A company asks Game Shakers to build a game based on a robot they created. The robot develops a bro-bot crush on Hudson and malfunctions.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 117
programme.desc: When a rival rapper releases a track about Double G, the Game Shakers convince Dub to respond. The traack enrages the rapper and he comes to confront Double G.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Now that Josh is no longer dating Mindy he wants to play the field and challenges Drake to a bet to see who can score more dates.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 214
programme.desc: In an attempt to get to know each other better and increase productivity, Kenzie organizes a team building retreat in Game Shakers.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: When Drake is falsely accused of playing a practical joke on one of his teachers and threatened with suspension, he and Josh plead their case before the Honor Council.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 113
programme.desc: Babe and Kenzie get complaints from their neighbour, so they bake him a pie. After the pie sends the neighbour to hospital, Dub and Trip must clear the girls' names. (S1, ep 13)

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Drake and Josh accidentally burn down their neighbor's tree house. Their parents force the boys to rebuild the tree house and Drake and Josh plan to do it quickly.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The boys return from tour and find Jo flirting with a hot new guy, new kids hanging out at the pool, and loads of schoolwork! With the second leg of their tour starting soon, will life in LA return to the way it was?

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The guys have been having a little too much fun living in Hollywood and after getting charged again for breaking stuff at the Palm Woods and Gustavo has had enough and makes them get jobs!

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The guys accidentally destroy the tape of the new Big Time Rush episode they were supposed to give the network. Needing a replacement episode the guys decide to make a blooper show which Stephen Glickman and Ciara Bravo host.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The boys are tired of sharing a ride and get money to buy a car, but all goes bananas when Drake buys an orangutan named Bobo instead.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Drake's new girlfriend might be tougher than him. Josh trying to impress Mindy's parents might be even tougher. Will the boys prevail, or will girl power rule the day?

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The guys all chase the same girl, causing problems in the band for the first time.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: BTR is making a cameo on a popular kid’s TV show, but Carlos’ pursuit of the show’s teen star puts him and Kendall in the crosshairs of her evil stage mother. Logan & James battle Yo Gabba Gabba over their amazing snack table.
